import { Manifest } from '../manifest.cjs'; import { MakeRouteMatch } from '../Matches.cjs'; export interface DehydratedMatch { i: MakeRouteMatch['id']; b?: MakeRouteMatch['__beforeLoadContext']; l?: MakeRouteMatch['loaderData']; e?: MakeRouteMatch['error']; u: MakeRouteMatch['updatedAt']; s: MakeRouteMatch['status']; ssr?: MakeRouteMatch['ssr']; g?: true; } export interface DehydratedRouter { manifest: Manifest | undefined; dehydratedData?: any; lastMatchId?: string; matches: Array<DehydratedMatch>; } export interface TsrSsrGlobal { router?: DehydratedRouter; h: () => void; e: () => void; c: () => void; p: (script: () => void) => void; buffer: Array<() => void>; t?: Map<string, (value: any) => any>; initialized?: boolean; hydrated?: boolean; streamEnded?: boolean; }
